lyrics.text: I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我回家了

lyrics.text: I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我回家了

lyrics.text: Tell the World I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 让全世界都知道我就要回来

lyrics.text: Let the rain wash away all the pain of yesterday
lyrics.translation: 让大雨洗刷尽一切过去的伤痛

lyrics.text: I know my kingdom awaits and they've forgiven my mistakes
lyrics.translation: 我知道故乡的伙伴翘首企盼我归来 他们已然原谅我犯下的过错

lyrics.text: I'm coming home I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我回家了

lyrics.text: Tell the World that I'm coming
lyrics.translation: 让全世界知道我就要回来

lyrics.text: Back where I belong yeah I never felt so strong
lyrics.translation: 回到我的小世界 我感到浑身充满了力量

lyrics.text: （I'm back baby）
lyrics.translation: （我回家了 宝贝）

lyrics.text: I feel like there's nothing that I can't try
lyrics.translation: 我觉得没有没有什么我做不到的事

lyrics.text: And if you with me put your hands high
lyrics.translation: 如果你愿与我高举双手

lyrics.text: （Put your hands high）
lyrics.translation: 举起双手

lyrics.text: If you ever lost a light before this one's for you
lyrics.translation: 若你曾失去希望 那这次独为你

lyrics.text: And you the dreams are for you
lyrics.translation: 这个梦想由你点燃

lyrics.text: I hear ＂The Tears of a Clown＂
lyrics.translation: 我听到有人唱“小丑的眼泪”

lyrics.text: I hate that song
lyrics.translation: 我讨厌那首歌

lyrics.text: I always feel like they talking to me when it comes on
lyrics.translation: 每次听到这首歌 我感觉他们是在唱给我听

lyrics.text: Another day another Dawn
lyrics.translation: 一天过去 一天又开始

lyrics.text: Another Keisha nice to meet ya get the math I'm gone
lyrics.translation: 遇见另一个keisha 说着 嘿 见到你真高兴 然后又离开

lyrics.text: What am I 'posed to do when the club lights come on
lyrics.translation: 当霓虹灯亮起 我该去做什么

lyrics.text: It's easy to be Puff it's harder to be Sean
lyrics.translation: 做Puff很容易 当Sean有点难

lyrics.text: What if the twins ask why I aint marry their mom （why damn! ）
lyrics.translation: 如果这两兄弟问我为什么不娶他们的妈妈我该怎么办（真见鬼！）

lyrics.text: How do I respond
lyrics.translation: 我应该怎么回答

lyrics.text: What if my son stares with a face like my own
lyrics.translation: 如果我的儿子凝视着我 有着神似我的脸庞

lyrics.text: And says he wants to be like me when he's grown
lyrics.translation: 说他长大以后要成为像我这样的人 我该怎么办

lyrics.text: Damn! But I aint finished growing
lyrics.translation: 见鬼！我还不够成熟

lyrics.text: Another night the inevitable prolongs
lyrics.translation: 又是一夜辗转难眠

lyrics.text: Another day another Dawn
lyrics.translation: 一天过去 一天又开始

lyrics.text: Just tell Taneka and Taresha I'll be better in the morn
lyrics.translation: '就跟Taneka和Taresha说我早上会好一些

lyrics.text: Another lie that I carry on
lyrics.translation: 用另一个谎延续前一个谎

lyrics.text: I need to get back to the place I belong
lyrics.translation: 我得回到属于我的那个地方

lyrics.text: I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我就要回来

lyrics.text: I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我就要回来

lyrics.text: Tell the World I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 让全世界都知道我要回来

lyrics.text: Let the rain wash away all the pain of yesterday
lyrics.translation: 让大雨洗刷尽一切过去的伤痛

lyrics.text: I know my kingdom awaits and they've forgiven my mistakes
lyrics.translation: 我知道故乡的伙伴翘首企盼我归来 他们已然原谅我犯下的过错

lyrics.text: I'm coming home I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我就要回来 我就要回来

lyrics.text: Tell the World that I'm coming
lyrics.translation: 让全世界都知道我要回来

lyrics.text: ＂A house is Not a Home＂ I hate this song“
lyrics.translation: 有房子不算有个家” 我讨厌这首歌

lyrics.text: Is a house really a home when your loved ones are gone
lyrics.translation: 当你的挚爱离你而去 房子还是你的家么

lyrics.text: And n-ggas got the nerve to blame you for it
lyrics.translation: 人们责怪你因为你的所作所为让他们担心受怕

lyrics.text: And you know you woulda took the bullet if you saw it
lyrics.translation: 但你知道如果你看到子弹朝你飞来你是不会自己撞上去的

lyrics.text: But you felt it and still feel it
lyrics.translation: 可你觉得心头空荡荡的 到现在还是这样

lyrics.text: And money can't make up for it or conceal it
lyrics.translation: 钱不能弥补它也不能欺骗你自己

lyrics.text: But you deal with it and you keep ballin
lyrics.translation: '但你挺过来了 你还跟原来一样打球

lyrics.text: Pour out some liquor play ball and we keep ballin
lyrics.translation: '哥们给我倒点酒 咱们一起打球

lyrics.text: Baby we've been living in sin 'cause we've been really in love
lyrics.translation: 宝贝 我们从来都生活在罪恶之中 因为我们真真彼此相爱

lyrics.text: But we've been living as friends
lyrics.translation: 但我们同普通朋友一样相处

lyrics.text: So you've been a guest in your own home
lyrics.translation: 那样你就成了自己家里的客人了

lyrics.text: It's time to make your house your home
lyrics.translation: 是时候把房子变成家了

lyrics.text: Pick up your phone come on
lyrics.translation: 接电话啊 快接

lyrics.text: I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我就要回来

lyrics.text: I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我就要回来

lyrics.text: Tell the World I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 让全世界都知道我要回来

lyrics.text: Let the rain wash away all the pain of yesterday
lyrics.translation: 让大雨洗刷尽一切过去的伤痛

lyrics.text: I know my kingdom awaits and they've forgiven my mistakes
lyrics.translation: 我知道故乡的伙伴翘首企盼我归来 他们已然原谅我犯下的过错

lyrics.text: I'm coming home I'm coming home
lyrics.translation: 我就要回来 我就要回来

lyrics.text: Tell the World that I'm coming
lyrics.translation: 让全世界都知道我要回来

lyrics.text: ＂Ain't No Stopping Us Now＂ I love that song“
lyrics.translation: 现在没有什么能够阻挡我们” 我喜欢这首歌

lyrics.text: Whenever it comes on it makes me feel strong
lyrics.translation: 每次听到 总能叫我充满力量

lyrics.text: I thought I told y'all that we won't stop
lyrics.translation: 我原以为我告诉过你 我们不会停歇

lyrics.text: We back cruising through Harlem Viso blocks
lyrics.translation: 我们从哈勒姆海上无尽的巡航中回来吧

lyrics.text: It's what made me saved me drove me crazy
lyrics.translation: 它曾改变我，拯救我，也曾让我疯狂

lyrics.text: Drove me away than embraced me
lyrics.translation: 它曾驱逐我，也曾拥抱我

lyrics.text: Forgave me for all of my shortcomings
lyrics.translation: 原谅我所有的缺点

lyrics.text: Welcome to my homecoming
lyrics.translation: 欢迎我的回归

lyrics.text: Yeah it's been a long time coming
lyrics.translation: 是啊 那是很久以前的事了

lyrics.text: Lot of fights lot of scars lot of bottles
lyrics.translation: 到处是打斗 到处是残殇 满地玻璃瓶子

lyrics.text: Lot of cars lot of ups lot of downs
lyrics.translation: 汽车在路上 来来去去

lyrics.text: Made it back lost my dog （I miss you BIG）
lyrics.translation: 回来吧 那条我走丢的狗（我好想你 BIG）

lyrics.text: And here I stand a better man! （a better man）
lyrics.translation: 现在 站在这里的是一个全新的我！（全新的我！）

lyrics.text: Thank you Lord （Thank you Lord）
lyrics.translation: 谢谢你 上帝（谢谢你）

lyrics.translation: 我就要回来
